'''Redkihl Rokk's spider droids''' were [[Droid/Legends|droids]] used by [[Redkihl Rokk]] to attempt to kill [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] while they were aboard [[Hungry Ghost|his ship]]. Before the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], Redkihl Rokk used these to stun opponents on a ship so he could loot the ship of valuable items.

==Appearances==
*{{Kids1997Cite|issue1=16|issue2=20|story=Death Star Pirates}} {{1st}}
